CustomField.description: Represents the monetary amount associated with the event (e.g., invoice value). [LOAD:No] [JUSTIFICATION:Contract Diary records are not data-loaded. They are created through a scheduler/flow.] [REPLACEMENT OBJECT API:NA] [REPLACEMENT FIELD API:NA] [COMMENTS:NA]
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Displays the monetary amount linked to the event (e.g., invoice).
CustomField.label: Amount
